recommendations.title: Conduct Investor Day Highlighting Nuclear EBITDA Bridge
recommendations.description: Organize an investor day by 2026-09-30 to communicate the EBITDA uplift from nuclear assets, enhancing valuation and investor confidence under BRSR and TCFD disclosures.
recommendations.profitability_link: Potential 5-10% P/E multiple expansion, equating to ₹1,000 Cr market cap uplift
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Tata Power investor communication on renewables
recommendations.roi_cap_reason: Capped at 400% (esg_positioning ceiling). Raw estimate was 1000%; cap prevents over-claim.

audit_trail.value: Leverage nuclear pivot for proactive investor communication
Investor disclosures improve cost of capital and valuation

recommendations.title: Issue ₹7,500 Cr Green Bonds by 2026-12-31
recommendations.description: Leverage the nuclear pivot to issue ₹7,500 Cr green bonds, capturing a 30 bps coupon saving and lowering cost of capital aligned with EU Taxonomy standards.
recommendations.profitability_link: ₹75 Cr annual interest cost saving at 30 bps coupon reduction

recommendations.title: Mobilize Skilled Workforce for Nuclear Project by 2026-10-31

recommendations.responsible_party: Head of HR and Project Management Office

recommendations.title: Develop Supply-Chain Hedging Strategy by 2026-08-31
